# KB tool WEB url

- https://editor.keyboard-tools.xyz/
- Load this: [JSON](keyboard-layout(3).json)
- Icons: [helpers SVG](../helpers/icons_svg.md)

## Razer

- [Synapse 4](Doom.synapse4)

Key bindings for keyboard (default) and Tartarus
